title: centaurea dichroa
intro: Centaurea dichroa, also known as the Dichroa febrifuga, is a plant species in the family Cornaceae, native to the Himalayan region and parts of China. The medicinal properties of Centaurea dichroa lie in its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of malaria, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Centaurea dichroa include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to relieve pain and reduce the risk of infection. Centaurea dichroa can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat fever and other related health issues.
